title: An Act relative to the Massachusetts Fire Training Council

abstracts.abstract: Senate, January 27, 2026 -- The committee on Public Safety and Homeland Security to whom was referred the petition (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 1743) of Michael O. Moore for legislation relative to the Massachusetts Fire Training Council, report the accompanying bill (Senate, No. 2856).

actions.description: Reported from the committee on Public Safety and Homeland Security
Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on Senate Ways and Means
